title: Employer Research, Opportunity Quality, and Scam Defense · Career Evidence Case: Role Quality Questions
summary: An urgent remote offer uses a recognizable logo, personal email, text interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently verifiable team. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the role quality questions increment in opportunity trust and risk dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Investigate management, onboarding, team work, accessibility, inclusion, security, on-call, workload, turnover, measurement, and growth through behavior questions.
Compare official records, products, customers, funding or revenue claims, leadership, security, labor, news, employee, and counterevidence with source limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Role Quality Questions · Theory Role Quality Questions
steps.instruction:
theory case — An urgent remote offer uses a personal address, text-only interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently confirmed role or recruiter. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: An urgent remote offer uses a personal address, text-only interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently confirmed role or recruiter. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Investigate management, onboarding, team work, accessibility, inclusion, security, on-call, workload, turnover, measurement, and growth through behavior questions. A defensible solution applies Role Quality Questions, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to opportunity trust and risk dossier.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-role-quality-questions — Investigate management, onboarding, team work, accessibility, inclusion, security, on-call, workload, turnover, measurement, and growth through behavior questions.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
focus: career-role-quality-questions
decision-evidence: Investigate management, onboarding, team work, accessibility, inclusion, security, on-call, workload, turnover, measurement, and growth through behavior questions.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.text: Culture labels provide stronger evidence than concrete recent examples. This fails the Role Quality Questions contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Investigate management, onboarding, team work, accessibility, inclusion, security, on-call, workload, turnover, measurement, and growth through behavior questions.
